ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (male/female) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "personal_best_100m" REAL /* Personal best time in the 100m event */,
  "personal_best_200m" REAL /* Personal best time in the 200m event */,
  "personal_best_400m" REAL /* Personal best time in the 400m event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty event(s) the coach is experienced in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 200m, 400m, 4x200m) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., sprint, distance, relay) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event in meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "time" REAL /* Time achieved in the event */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored based on the time */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the performance in m/s */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the performance in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the performance as a percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the sprint event */,
  "time" REAL /* Time achieved in the sprint event */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the athlete in seconds */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed achieved by the athlete in m/s */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sprint's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sprint's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_events" (
  "distance_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the distance event */,
  "time" REAL /* Time achieved in the distance event */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the athlete in minutes per kilometer */,
  "stride_length" REAL /* Stride length of the athlete in meters */,
  "stride_frequency" REAL /* Stride frequency of the athlete in strides per minute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distance event's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distance event's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distance_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relays" (
  "relay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relay event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the relay event */,
  "time" REAL /* Time achieved in the relay event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the relay */,
  "leg_number" INTEGER /* Leg number of the relay */,
  "split_time" REAL /* Split time for the leg */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relay's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relay's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relays_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relays_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes_coaches" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete-coach relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete-coach relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id", "coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events_performances" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event-performance relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event-performance relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, athlete, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions_details" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events_categories" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event-category relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event-category relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
